components.buttons: rounded-md font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md active:shadow-none
components.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
components.inputs: rounded-md border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-900/10 transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: yarn add framer-motion lucide-react date-fns recharts @radix-ui/react-dialog @radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu @radix-ui/react-select @radix-ui/react-slot @radix-ui/react-toast class-variance-authority clsx tailwind-merge
THEME_SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js to use the 'Swiss Utility' color palette defined in this JSON. Replace the default 'zinc' or 'slate' approach with our specific hex codes.
LAYOUT_STRATEGY: Use a 'Sidebar Layout' for the dashboard. The sidebar should be fixed on desktop, drawer on mobile.
ATTENDANCE_UI: Do NOT use a simple table. Create a grid of student cards (AttendanceCard) that can be clicked to toggle status (Present -> Absent -> Late).
INVOICE_UI: Create a dedicated 'InvoicePreview' component that looks like a real paper invoice (white box, shadow, print styles).
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards). Format: 'page-section-element'.
ROLES: Ensure the sidebar menu filters items based on user role (Admin: all, Teacher: Attendance/Classes, Student: Fees/Profile).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.accessibility: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for all text. Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.responsive: Mobile-first. Tables must have horizontal scroll on mobile or switch to card view.
